zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Marney於1412年出生在英國艾可萊也 芒尼時，她的父親Sir William Marney42歲，母親Elizabeth Sergeaux35歲。她於大約1423年與Sir Thomas Tyrrell在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1480年在英國哈普爾賀隆享年69歲，埋葬在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Marney于1412年出生在英国艾可萊也 芒尼时，她的父亲Sir William Marney42岁，母亲Elizabeth Sergeaux35岁。她于大约1423年与Sir Thomas Tyrrell在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1480年在英国哈普爾賀隆享年69岁，埋葬在英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登。

nameMeanings.name: Marney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Marigny (Manche), so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Marinius + the locative suffix -acum.
Altered form of French Marnay: habitational name from any of several places in France called Marnay, e.g. in Vienne.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Marney was born in 1412, in Layer Marney, Essex, England, her father, Sir William Marney, was 42 and her mother, Elizabeth Sergeaux, was 35. She married Sir Thomas Tyrrell about 1423, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1480, in Heron, Hampshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in East Horndon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Marney est née en 1412, à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Marney, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sergeaux, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Tyrrell environ 1423, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1480, à Heron, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Marney 1412 in Layer Marney, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Marney 42 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Sergeaux 35. Sie hat um 1423 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Tyrrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1480 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Heron, Hampshire, England und wurde in East Horndon, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Marney è nata il nel 1412 nel Layer Marney, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir William Marney, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Sergeaux, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Tyrrell circa 1423, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1480, nel Heron, Hampshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a East Horndon, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Marneyが1412年にイギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーで生まれた時，父Sir William Marneyは42歳，母Elizabeth Sergeauxは35歳であった。約1423年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでSir Thomas Tyrrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1480年にイギリスハンプシュアイアハーオンで69歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Marney(이)가 1412년 영국 에세스 레이어 마니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Marney(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Sergeaux(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Sir Thomas Tyrrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1480년 영국 함프실르 허에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Marney nasceu em 1412, em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Marney, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sergeaux, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Tyrrell aproximadamente 1423, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1480, em Heron, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Marney родилась в 1412 г. в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Marney было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sergeaux, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Tyrrell около 1423 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1480 г. в местности хирон, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Marney nació en 1412, en Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Marney, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Sergeaux, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Tyrrell aproximadamente 1423, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1480, en Heron, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra.
